title: Belgium’s medicine security framework embedded in Critical Medicines Act [Advocacy Lab]
summary_full: In a significant win for Belgian Health Minister Frank Vandenbroucke, medicine policy is emerging as part of Europe’s broader industrial and geopolitical strategy.
